```instructions
---
name: "GitHub-Metadata"
description: "Guidance for maintaining .github markdown metadata"
applyTo: ".github/**/*.md"
---
# .github Metadata Maintenance

- Keep folder indexes (`README.md`) synchronized with actual files.
- Keep workflow counts and references accurate.
- Prefer relative links within repository docs.
- Use consistent naming and frontmatter schema for prompts/chatmodes/agents/instructions.
- Avoid duplicate guidance spread across many files; centralize shared policy.
- When guidance changes materially, update the “last updated” marker where present.
```
